originalCode:
# Changelog

Notable changes.

---

## 2026-06-04

### Karpathy Guidelines
- Added `skills/karpathy-guidelines/` — reduce LLM coding mistakes
- 4 principles: Think Before Coding, Simplicity First, Surgical Changes, Goal-Driven
- From [Andrej Karpathy](https://x.com/karpathy/status/2015883857489522876), [multica-ai](https://github.com/multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills)
- Impact: less overcomplication, questions before code, surgical changes

---

## 2026-04-03

### Initial Setup
- 3 plugins adapted: Superpowers (14 skills, 1 agent), ECC (~130 skills, 37 agents), UI/UX Pro Max (design DB)
- `.claude/` → `.augment/`
- Session lifecycle rules: transparency banners, auto-resume, auto-save, continuous-learning inline
- Priority: Superpowers > ECC
- ck centralized at `~/.augment/ck/`
- Docs: INSTALL.md, SKILLS-AND-AGENTS.md, README.md

---

## 2026-04-04 — MCP Servers

### Added
- **4 free MCP servers** configured via `auggie mcp add`:
  - **Context7** — live library/framework documentation lookup
  - **iterm-mcp** — iTerm2 terminal read/write integration
  - **playwright** — browser automation and E2E testing
  - **sequential-thinking** — structured multi-step reasoning
- Updated `README.md` with MCP server table
- Updated `CHANGELOG.md` with MCP entry

### Notes
- Paid MCP servers (Exa, Firecrawl, fal.ai, Jira, Nutrient, LaraPlugins) deferred until API keys available
- Node.js v22 required for `auggie` CLI (v16 in default PATH needs fixing)

---

## 2026-04-03 — Initial Setup

### Security
- `session.json` excluded (contains auth token)
- Local data gitignored: sessions, checkpoints, task storage, ck contexts, prompt history
- `.gitkeep` files preserve directory structure in repo
modifiedCode:
# Changelog

Notable changes.

---

## 2026-06-04

### Karpathy Guidelines
- Added `skills/karpathy-guidelines/` — reduce LLM coding mistakes
- 4 principles: Think Before Coding, Simplicity First, Surgical Changes, Goal-Driven
- From [Andrej Karpathy](https://x.com/karpathy/status/2015883857489522876), [multica-ai](https://github.com/multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills)
- Impact: less overcomplication, questions before code, surgical changes

---

## 2026-04-03

### Initial Setup
- 3 plugins adapted: Superpowers (14 skills, 1 agent), ECC (~130 skills, 37 agents), UI/UX Pro Max (design DB)
- `.claude/` → `.augment/`
- Session lifecycle rules: transparency banners, auto-resume, auto-save, continuous-learning inline
- Priority: Superpowers > ECC
- ck centralized at `~/.augment/ck/`
- Docs: INSTALL.md, SKILLS-AND-AGENTS.md, README.md

---

## 2026-04-04

### MCP Servers
- 4 free: Context7 (docs), iterm-mcp (terminal), playwright (browser), sequential-thinking (reasoning)
- Paid (deferred): Exa, Firecrawl, fal.ai, Jira, Nutrient, LaraPlugins

---

## 2026-04-03 — Initial Setup

### Security
- `session.json` excluded (contains auth token)
- Local data gitignored: sessions, checkpoints, task storage, ck contexts, prompt history
- `.gitkeep` files preserve directory structure in repo
